Majjhimapaṇṇāsaṭṭhakathā/X/Mahārāhulovād.text: Ekaṁ antaṁ nāma (Syā), ṭhitaṁ antaṁ nāma (Ka)
Ekaṁ antaṁ nāma (Syā), ṭhitaṁ antaṁ nāma (Ka)

Majjhimapaṇṇāsaṭṭhakathā/X/Mahāvacchasut.text: Hotu caraṇaṁ vā hotu maraṇaṁ vā (Syā), karaṇaṁ vā hotu akaraṇaṁ vā (Ka)

variants.reading: Hotu caraṇaṁ vā hotu maraṇaṁ vā

Majjhimapaṇṇāsaṭṭhakathā/X/Mahāsakuludāy.text: Purimapurimaṁ pacchimassa pacchimassa (Sī), purimaṁ pacchimassa (Syā), purimaṁ pacchimassa pacchimaṁ purimassa (?)

Majjhimapaṇṇāsaṭṭhakathā/Brāhmaṇavagga/B.text: Udaraṁ āhananto viya (Sī), udakādānaṁ āharanto viya (Syā)

Majjhimapaṇṇāsaṭṭhakathā/X/Caṅkīsuttavaṇ.text: Kelāyanā paṭikelāyanā (Sī, Ka) Abhi 2. 365 piṭṭhe pana passitabbaṁ.
